lessons.name: Unit 4: Remembering the Past
lessons.description: Learn about the past with past continuous and wish + past simple.

sections.heading: 1. Từ vựng (Vocabulary)
sections.content:
Past events: memory, remember, recall, forget, remind, nostalgia, childhood, youth, generation, ancestor, heritage, tradition

Historical: history, historical, ancient, old, past, former, previous, war, peace, independence, revolution

Feelings: miss, regret, wish, hope, dream, proud, grateful, sad, happy, excited

Time expressions: in the past, long ago, years ago, at that time, in those days, back then, once upon a time

sections.heading: 2. Luyện tập từ vựng
sections.content: Practice using vocabulary in context about memories, historical events, and past experiences.

sections.heading: 3. Ngữ pháp (Grammar)
sections.content:
A. Past Continuous (Quá khứ tiếp diễn)

1. Cấu trúc:

  • Khẳng định: S + was/were + V-ing
  • Ex: I was studying at 8 p.m. yesterday.
  • Phủ định: S + was/were + not + V-ing
  • Ex: She wasn't watching TV.
  • Nghi vấn: Was/Were + S + V-ing?
  • Ex: Were you sleeping at that time?

2. Cách dùng:

  • Hành động đang xảy ra tại thời điểm cụ thể trong quá khứ
  • Ex: At 9 p.m. last night, I was doing homework.
  • Hai hành động đang xảy ra song song
  • Ex: While I was cooking, she was cleaning.
  • Hành động đang xảy ra thì bị hành động khác xen vào
  • Ex: I was watching TV when he called.
  • Ex: When I arrived, they were having dinner.

3. Dấu hiệu nhận biết:

  • at + giờ + thời gian quá khứ (at 8 p.m. yesterday)
  • at this time last + thời gian (at this time last week)
  • when, while, as

B. Wish + Past Simple (Ước trong hiện tại)

1. Cấu trúc:

  • S + wish(es) + S + V (past simple)
  • S + wish(es) + S + were/was (not) + ...

2. Cách dùng:

  • Ước điều không có thật ở hiện tại
  • Ex: I wish I had a car. (Thực tế: I don't have a car.)
  • Ex: She wishes she were taller. (Thực tế: She isn't tall.)
  • Ex: I wish I could fly. (Thực tế: I can't fly.)

3. Lưu ý:

  • Với động từ 'be': dùng were cho tất cả các ngôi (chuẩn)
  • Ex: I wish I were rich. (không phải 'was')
  • Với động từ khuyết thiếu: can → could; will → would
  • Ex: I wish I could speak English well.

sections.heading: 4-11. Các phần còn lại
sections.content: Getting Started, A Closer Look 1-2, Communication, Skills 1-2, Looking Back, Project

problemTypes.name: Dạng 1: Past Continuous - Thời điểm cụ thể
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • S + was/were + V-ing
  • Dùng khi có thời điểm cụ thể trong quá khứ

examples.question: I ______ (study) at 8 p.m. yesterday.
examples.explanation: Thời điểm cụ thể → past continuous

examples.question: They ______ (play) football at this time last week.
examples.solution: They were playing football at this time last week.
examples.explanation: at this time last week → past continuous

examples.question: She ______ (cook) dinner at 6 p.m. yesterday.
examples.solution: She was cooking dinner at 6 p.m. yesterday.
examples.explanation: Thời điểm cụ thể → was cooking

problemTypes.name: Dạng 2: Past Continuous với When/While
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • When + past simple, past continuous
  • Past continuous + when + past simple
  • While + past continuous, past continuous

examples.question: I ______ (watch) TV when he ______ (call).
examples.explanation: Hành động đang xảy ra + when + hành động xen vào

examples.question: While I ______ (cook), she ______ (clean).
examples.explanation: While + past continuous, past continuous (song song)

problemTypes.name: Dạng 3: Wish + Past Simple
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • S + wish(es) + S + V (past simple)
  • Ước điều không có thật ở hiện tại
  • be → were (tất cả ngôi)

examples.question: I wish I ______ (have) a car.
examples.explanation: Thực tế: I don't have → wish + had

examples.question: She wishes she ______ (be) taller.
examples.explanation: Thực tế: She isn't → wish + were

examples.question: I wish I ______ (can) fly.
examples.explanation: Thực tế: I can't → wish + could

problemTypes.name: Dạng 4: Kết hợp Past Continuous và Wish
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • Sử dụng cả past continuous và wish trong ngữ cảnh
  • Chú ý thì và cấu trúc

examples.question: I ______ (study) when my friend called. I wish I ______ (have) more free time.
examples.solution: I was studying when my friend called. I wish I had more free time.
examples.explanation: Past continuous + when + past simple; wish + past simple

examples.question: While I ______ (work), I thought about the past. I wish I ______ (be) young again.
examples.solution: While I was working, I thought about the past. I wish I were young again.

examples.question: They ______ (play) when it started raining. They wish it ______ (not rain).
examples.solution: They were playing when it started raining. They wish it didn't rain.
examples.explanation: Past continuous + when; wish + didn't + V

exercises.question: I ______ at 8 p.m. yesterday.
exercises.explanation: Thời điểm cụ thể → past continuous

exercises.question: They ______ football at this time last week.
exercises.explanation: at this time last week → past continuous

exercises.question: I ______ TV when he called.
When I arrived, they ______ dinner.
While I ______, she was cleaning.
I wish I ______ a car.
She wishes she ______ taller.
I wish I ______ fly.
He wishes he ______ speak English well.
I wish I ______ more money.
Which sentences use past continuous correctly? (Select all that apply)
options: They were playing when it rained.
While I was working, he was reading.
exercises.explanation: Đúng: was studying, were playing when, was working/was reading. Sai: was cook (phải là 'was cooking')

exercises.question: Which are correct wish sentences? (Select all that apply)
options: I wish I had a car.
He wishes he could speak English.
exercises.explanation: Đúng: had, were, could. Sai: can (phải là 'could')

exercises.question: Which time expressions indicate past continuous? (Select all that apply)
exercises.explanation: Đúng: at 8 p.m. yesterday, at this time last week, when I arrived. Sai: every day (present simple)

exercises.question: Fill in: I ______ (study) at 8 p.m. yesterday.
exercises.explanation: Thời điểm cụ thể → past continuous

exercises.question: Fill in: I ______ (watch) TV when he ______ (call).
Fill in: I wish I ______ (have) a car.
Fill in: She wishes she ______ (be) taller.
Rearrange: studying / I / was / at / 8 p.m. / yesterday / . / watching / was / I / TV / when / called / he / .
exercises.sample_answer: I was studying at 8 p.m. yesterday. I was watching TV when he called.
exercises.explanation: Sắp xếp: past continuous với thời điểm cụ thể và when

exercises.question: Transform: I don't have a car. → I wish ______.
exercises.sample_answer: I wish I had a car.
exercises.explanation: Biến đổi: don't have → wish + had

exercises.question: Transform: She isn't tall. → She wishes ______.
exercises.sample_answer: She wishes she were tall. / She wishes she were taller.

exercises.question: Rearrange: cooking / While / I / was / , / cleaning / she / was / . / wish / I / had / I / time / more / .
exercises.sample_answer: While I was cooking, she was cleaning. I wish I had more time.
exercises.explanation: Sắp xếp: While + past continuous, past continuous; wish + past simple

exercises.question: Transform and combine: I was studying. My friend called. + I don't have free time. (Use past continuous with 'when' and wish)
exercises.sample_answer: I was studying when my friend called. I wish I had free time.
exercises.explanation: Biến đổi: Câu 1 dùng past continuous + when + past simple; Câu 2 dùng wish + had
